notes: The cabin evidence board — the interactive meta-mystery. Each stick hides one secret that fires a token when found. On the board you PIN two discovered secrets; if they form an authored connection, you ASSEMBLE a thread — the resonance is named, never resolved (1976 stays open, the star stays a shape, the note stays two words). Distinct from almanac_unlocks.json, which assembles threads passively on Almanac-open; this is the player's own deduction act, modeled on the Patient Mister Glass contradiction ledger. Revealed connections persist via their `fires` token and light a THREADS entry in the Almanac. All members are OneironauticsTokens flags. See lore/_ONEIRONAUTS_ALMANAC_DESIGN.md.

secrets.label: the 1976 poster
secrets.note: a harbor-office bulletin, thirty years stale, that nobody has taken down.

secrets.label: the waterline
secrets.note: you watched it until it watched back. the water at Camp Sweetgum keeps a level it should not.

secrets.label: the eighth point
secrets.note: the field has eight corners, not the four the sisters admit to.

secrets.label: the subfloor
secrets.note: one level below M, the room the map declines to print.

secrets.label: Rocha's correction
secrets.note: the version Rocha kept, set beside the one Hubbard printed.

secrets.label: 'for jack'
secrets.note: two words in blue pen, tucked between two books in the trailer that do not touch it.

secrets.label: the mourning bar
secrets.note: one bar nobody plays twice. it does not resolve; it just holds.

connections.title: THE YEAR THAT KEEPS SURFACING
connections.text: A poster from 1976 in a harbor office two counties north. A waterline at Camp Sweetgum that will not settle, watched in a summer decades later. The same year, at the same water, in two sticks that were never shipped together. You are not told what happened in 1976. You are only shown, twice, that it did.

connections.title: THE SHAPE UNDER THE FLOOR
connections.text: Eight points on the Wyrd field, where four were promised. A room one level below M, laid out to the same count. The eight-pointed shape recurs wherever the walls go thin — a field in Nevada, a subfloor in a mountain. It is not a symbol you are given the meaning of. It is a shape you keep finding.

connections.title: THE SAME HAND, TWO DECADES APART
connections.text: Rocha's correction, kept against the printed lie. Two words in blue pen — 'for jack' — in a Faire trailer that has no business holding them. The hand is the same. The decades are not. Something of Rocha's kept writing after Rocha, in a game he never touched.

connections.title: THE NOTE THAT WILL NOT MOVE
connections.text: In the Basilica, one pitch holds still while every other frequency shreds you — the null line, the safe frequency, the room that agrees to stay. In the Melody Club, one bar refuses to resolve and nobody plays it twice. Two rooms, decades apart, built around a single tone that declines to end. You never learn what the note is for. You learn that it is the same note.
